Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reader (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 1''' — Readers are a type of individual, with some being able to lay curses for hire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Chroniclers are talented Readers by definition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The prisoner requests a Reader to test him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Readers can consciously observe and manipulate the Intent stored in objects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Readers are better at crafting tools, investigating crimes, creating weapons, enacting subtle sabotage, and manipulating information received by other Readers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Readers can use Reading to determine information through touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Reading requires focus and strength to bring out an object's full potential.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Readers possess Reader senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Shera is not a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Reading is a discipline involving the ability to sense and manipulate human Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — A Reader can feel the power of Nakothi's song directly with their senses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — A Reader is a person who can Awaken an object.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — The Emperor needs a Reader that meets several criteria, including age.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — A Reader is a type of individual with specific powers that Shera can target with her blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — A Reader is much more powerful than the prisoners Shera killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — Readers have very little Intent to manipulate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — A Reader is someone who can pick up visions from stored Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — A Reader can pick up on strong emotions through Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 7''' — Readers have rules regarding what they can and cannot do.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Readers are a group of people who can influence the course of weapons with their power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Readers possess certain advantages and sensitivities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — Readers often complain about a lack of detail in their Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — One of the Architects is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Shera's target is a Reader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Being a Reader causes the mind to expand and swirl on the mists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — A Reader would not be able to uncover Rudeus's connection to the Consultants after his blacks are burned.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 17''' — Readers are a group that includes Lucan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Loreli uses her Reader's awareness to sense through the water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Readers are found among the Architects at Shera's meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — A Reader was searching for Loreli close by.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
